message:
fix(sling): send work prompt to fresh polecats instead of skipping

Fresh polecats were only receiving a generic StartupNudge ("check your
hook") from SessionManager.Start(), but injectStartPrompt() — which
sends the specific work prompt with bead ID and title — was being
skipped for freshly spawned polecats. This caused them to sit idle at
the welcome screen until timeout or witness nuked them.

Remove the freshlySpawned skip so fresh polecats go through the same
ensureAgentReady() + injectStartPrompt() path as existing sessions.

Fixes: gt-dz2g0e

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
